metadata.title: Interview Scheduling AI Agent
metadata.description: Coordinate interview rounds, candidate self-scheduling, reminders, and no-show recovery with an AI scheduling agent.

page.title: Interview Scheduling AI Agent
page.description: A recruiting agent for calendar matching, candidate self-scheduling, time zone conversion, rescheduling, reminders, and no-show recovery.

defaults.notes: Candidate prefers weekday daytime interviews and can do all rounds this week.

hero.title: A recruiter control tower with candidate self-scheduling and exception recovery built in.
hero.description: This demo is designed for interviews: realistic scenarios, visible scheduling logic, and enough product polish to feel like a mature SaaS workflow instead of a static mockup.

demo_scenarios.title: Demo scenarios
demo_scenarios.description: Load a realistic hiring situation so the interviewer can quickly see why the workflow behaves the way it does.

items.title: Campus hiring across APAC
items.summary: An APAC intern pipeline that needs same-week turnaround while keeping the candidate inside daytime-friendly interview windows.
items.notes: Candidate prefers weekday daytime interviews and can do all rounds this week.

items.title: Global PM loop with tight overlap
items.summary: A senior PM interview loop where recruiter, hiring manager, and panelists sit in different regions and overlap windows are limited.
items.notes: Candidate can only interview during morning ET. Hiring manager wants all rounds completed before Friday.

items.title: Late-stage reschedule recovery
items.summary: A near-final-round candidate requested a last-minute change. The system should recover once automatically before escalating back to recruiting.
items.notes: Candidate can rejoin after 3pm CST. Preserve interviewer sequence and offer one auto-rebook before recruiter escalation.

intake.title: Scheduling intake workspace
intake.description: A recruiter-facing workspace for candidate constraints, role context, SLA pressure, and scenario setup before the agent runs.

planner.title: AI Planner Output
planner.description: Run the agent to generate a recruiter-ready summary, messaging drafts, and operational risks.
planner.placeholder: Run the agent to generate this section.

demo.summary: {candidate} now has {rounds} recommended rounds, with {crossTimezone} cross-timezone handoffs and fallback coverage on {fallback} stages.
demo.recruiter_brief: Start with {firstStage} at {firstTime}, then keep the loop moving until {lastTime}. Current scheduling SLA target is {sla}.
demo.candidate_confirmation: Hi {candidate}, your {role} interview plan is ready. You can confirm one of the recommended options and move through all {rounds} rounds without recruiter email ping-pong.
demo.interviewer_reminder: Share the structured brief with interviewers for the {role} loop and keep fallback slots reserved until the candidate confirms.
demo.next_action_share: Share the first {firstStage} option with the candidate at {time}.
demo.next_action_hold: Hold fallback capacity for {sla} so recruiter intervention stays low.
demo.next_action_monitor: Monitor for reschedule or no-show signals and trigger one automatic recovery flow before escalation.
demo.risk_timezone: Cross-timezone overlap is still the primary scheduling constraint in this scenario.
demo.risk_fallback: One or more rounds have shallow fallback depth. Keep backup holds active until the candidate confirms.
demo.risk_constraints: Candidate preferences and interviewer availability are currently aligned, but any change should reopen slot scoring.

errors.generic: Failed to generate the interview plan

console.title: Recruiter Scheduling Console
console.description: The agent recommends the earliest feasible sequence while respecting time zones, stage order, and candidate-friendly hours.
console.no_slot: No valid slot found for this stage.

candidate.title: Candidate Self-Scheduling
candidate.description: A candidate-facing view where the agent offers a few compliant slots instead of endless email back-and-forth.
candidate.all_booked: All interview rounds are already booked. This panel will reopen if a stage needs to be rescheduled.

notifications.title: Reminder & Notification Preview
notifications.candidate_confirmation_body: Hi {candidate}, your interview for {role} has been scheduled. The agent will send a reminder 24 hours and 1 hour before the meeting.
notifications.interviewer_reminder_body: You have an upcoming interview. Please review the candidate profile and submit structured feedback within 2 hours after the meeting.
notifications.no_show_policy_body: If the candidate misses the interview, the agent offers one automatic rebooking opportunity using the next best compliant slot. Further exceptions escalate to a recruiter.

operations.title: Operations snapshot
operations.description: A compact business view of the current scenario so interviewers can read urgency, coverage, and market complexity immediately.

steps.title: 1. Initial screen
steps.description: Candidate passes screening, ATS triggers the agent with role, stage, and timezone constraints.

steps.title: 2. Slot generation
steps.description: Agent checks interviewer calendars, applies stage order, candidate-friendly hours, and time zone conversion.

steps.title: 3. Candidate self-scheduling
steps.description: Candidate receives 3 to 5 compliant time options and confirms one without recruiter back-and-forth.

steps.title: 4. Confirmation & reminder
steps.description: Agent creates the booking, sends reminders, and syncs the interview status to ATS.

steps.title: 5. Exception handling
steps.description: If there is a conflict, reschedule request, or no-show, the agent offers one automatic rebooking before escalating to a human recruiter.

items: 1. Read candidate constraints and role requirements.
2. Check interviewer calendars and stage owners.
3. Score slots using earliest-fit plus candidate-friendly hour rules.
4. Offer candidate self-scheduling options and keep fallbacks ready.
5. Auto-rebook once on no-show, then escalate to a human recruiter.
Auto-reschedule and handle one no-show recovery
Trigger reminders in a production version

next.intro: For a real production agent, connect this UI to:
items: Rules engine for interviewer assignment and escalation

activity.title: Agent Activity
activity.footer: This prototype demonstrates workflow logic for scheduling, self-booking, reminders, and no-show recovery. In production, the agent would also create meeting links, sync ATS status, record exceptions, and escalate complex cases to a recruiter.
activity.ready: Agent ready: waiting for candidate details and stage rules.
activity.reset: Agent reset. Waiting for the next scheduling run.
activity.auto_booked_path: Auto-booked the highest-confidence path across all available rounds.

run.checked_calendars: Checked interviewer calendars and applied working-hour constraints.
run.sequenced_rounds: Sequenced the multi-round interview plan using earliest-fit logic.
run.cross_timezone_handoffs: Found {count} rounds that require cross-timezone coordination.
run.same_region_fit: Primary sequence stays within closely aligned working hours.
run.generated_options: Generated self-scheduling options, reminders, and fallback reschedule options.
run.demo_briefing: Generated a demo-safe recruiter brief and fallback messaging without requiring live integrations.

activity.rescheduled: Agent detected {reason} and rescheduled {stage} to {time} with {interviewer}.
activity.no_show_detected: No-show detected for {stage}. Triggering auto-rebooking policy.
